body.notes: Replace priority field with inference_rank (1-4). Add network_type wired|wifi. Add in_use_hours [[start,end]]. Add roles list (db_host, igor_home). Add aliases list for habit name matching. Confirm akienyogai7 RAM (16GB or 8GB?). D211.
body.title: machines.json: inference_rank, network_type, in_use_hours, roles, aliases
body.result: Updated offline machines (akienasus, akienpi) in machines.json: removed priority:batch, added inference_rank (5/6), network_type, in_use_hours, roles, aliases per D211. All 6 machines now appear in get_machine_availability(). Alias resolution verified. akienyogai7 RAM remains at 16GB (unconfirmed per ticket note).
